title: Prophecy
description: Demo of a pixel art narrative platformer, with Visual Novel segments.

title: Dress Up Game
description: A dress-up game allowing character customisation with many options.

title: Solar System
description: Explore our solar system at a reduced scale, piloting a small spaceship.

title: Breakout for Candy
description: A classic brick-breaker with increasing difficulty.

title: The Herbarium
description: A cozy game inspired by Cooking Mama, focused on crafting potions.

title: TUBP
description: Exploration and puzzle-solving in a procedural maze, with a minimalist aesthetic.

title: Sur la bonne voie
description: A relaxing railway management game set on a peaceful island.

title: Vallée d'Éther
description: An exploration game where a little fox roams the valley before winter arrives.

title: Character Maker
description: A Blender addon for creating stylised portrait art with advanced face editing.

title: Blink Doctor
description: An addon for Rhythm Doctor allowing you to play by blinking instead of pressing keys.
